# श्रद्धांजलि बॅनर

> Free online memorial banner generator supporting 12 major Indian languages — for families across Maharashtra and all Indian regions.

## What this site does

Creates customizable funeral/memorial announcement banners that families can download and print or share digitally. The user fills in details — deceased name, age, date of passing, ceremony location, family members — and a formatted banner image is generated entirely in the browser and downloaded as a JPG. The full UI (labels, buttons, banner output text) switches language instantly without a page reload.

## Key features

- 6 visual banner themes (परंपरागत / Traditional, सूर्यास्त / Sunset, सागर / Ocean, क्लासिक / Classic, सोने / Golden, आकाश / Lavender)
- **12 Indian language UI:** मराठी (Marathi, default), हिन्दी (Hindi), English, বাংলা (Bengali), తెలుగు (Telugu), தமிழ் (Tamil), ગુજરાતી (Gujarati), ಕನ್ನಡ (Kannada), മലയാളം (Malayalam), ਪੰਜਾਬੀ (Punjabi), ଓଡ଼ିଆ (Odia), اردو (Urdu)
- Language preference persists across sessions (localStorage)
- Photo upload with decorative gold frame overlay; optional second photo for speaker/organizer
- Multiple download formats:
  - Standard print banner (landscape)
  - WhatsApp status (9:16 portrait, 1080×1920)
  - Instagram story (9:16 portrait, 1080×1920)
  - Instagram post (1:1 square, 1080×1080)
  - Flex print (2×3, 3×4, 4×6, 6×4 ft at 72/150/300 DPI)
- Completely free, no account, no data stored on server

## Audience

Indian families across all regions — Marathi, Hindi, Bengali, Telugu, Tamil, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Punjabi, Odia, and Urdu speaking — who need to create memorial announcement banners (श्रद्धांजलि बॅनर) for religious ceremonies: दशक्रिया, अंत्यसंस्कार, shradhanjali programmes, punyatithi.

## Common search terms this serves

श्रद्धांजलि बॅनर, शोक संदेश बॅनर, अंत्यसंस्कार बॅनर, nidhan banner generator, dasagriya banner, diwangat banner, free marathi memorial banner, shraddhanjali banner online, Bengali shradhanjali card, Telugu memorial banner, Tamil funeral card, Gujarati shradhanjali poster, 12 language memorial banner India

## Technical

- Static single-page application, hosted on Netlify
- Client-side only image generation using html2canvas library
- No backend, no cookies, no analytics beyond Google Tag (G-67SQSS4D5L)
- Bootstrap 5 grid used only inside the banner element for layout capture
- Fonts: Rozha One (display), Tiro Devanagari Marathi (body) via Google Fonts

## URLs

- Main app: https://shradhanjalibanner.in/
- Sitemap: https://shradhanjalibanner.in/sitemap.xml
